infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to let you take photos for editing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to let you pick images for editing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app saves edited images to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you pick images for editing.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to let you take photos for editing.
